channel.title: GitHub HCL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: DataDog/serverless-sample-app
item.description: Explore Datadog's serverless observability features with this sample app.

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cluster-toolkit
item.description: Cluster Toolkit is an open-source software offered by Google Cloud which makes it easy for customers to deploy AI/ML and HPC environments on Google Cloud.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
item.description: Terraform module to generate well-formed JSON documents (container definitions) that are passed to the aws_ecs_task_definition Terraform resource

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-foundation-fabric
item.description: End-to-end modular samples and landing zones toolkit for Terraform on GCP.
